chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-364 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.1934/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.1679/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.1680/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 None present for the petitioner, nor intimation received and same was the position on 20-03-2025, when an urgent application was also dismissed, which shows that the petitioner is not interested to proceed with the matter. As a result thereof, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
